intro: The capsule of Acorus calamus, also known as sweet flag, is a small, three-chambered structure that contains several seeds. It is typically greenish-brown in color and has a smooth, glossy texture. The capsule splits open to release the seeds, which are often dispersed by water, contributing to the plant's ability to grow in wet environments.
